---
title: "Communicating Findings"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03-sp02"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02"
toc: True
---









<!-- Standard workflow: content imported from Word -->
<!-- Advanced users may edit directly -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Reading the Outbreak Report</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se02-sec03-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Public Health Implications</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
